summary: This course, Foundations of Optimization, will cover key topics such as network optimization, linear programming, and dynamic programming. Throughout the course, students will learn how to model real-world problems as optimization challenges, develop analytical skills, design algorithms, and apply these concepts to various scenarios. The programming language used will be Python. Assignments will be a crucial component of the grading, along with a midterm and a final exam. Which topic would you like to tackle first?
